title: The Last Cars Are Cut Away
description: The threat of Enies Lobby and the Gate of Justice becomes real as Robin and Franky are dragged deeper into World Government territory.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Spandam, Blueno, Luffy, Zoro, Franky. The threat of Enies Lobby and the Gate of Justice becomes real as Robin and Franky are dragged deeper into World Government territory.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Hey, pay attention to where you're looking...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: going through all this trouble to escape...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Wahaha, look how this turned out!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Why are you helping those guys?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And her comrades won't leave without her....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Who, exactly, are you talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: That buster call is the problem...

summary: The threat of Enies Lobby and the Gate of Justice becomes real as Robin and Franky are dragged deeper into World Government territory.
